# Nested Lists

- First item
  - Sub-item A
  - Sub-item B
  - Sub-item C
- Second item
  - Sub-item D
  - Sub-item E
- Third item

## Ordered Nested

1. Step one
   - Detail alpha
   - Detail beta
2. Step two
   - Detail gamma

## Deep Nesting

- Level one
  - Level two
    - Level three item
  - Back to level two

Paragraph after nested lists.
